The short question length and short-text answer suggest limited procedural complexity.
verifiability: The expected answer is a short text label ('Compensation depth'), which is typically easy to compare against a reference answer.

Verification is somewhat softened by open-text formatting variation risk, but the target concept appears specific and well-defined.
